# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

services:
  - name: service1
    url: http://service1:8080
    routes:
      - name: service1-route
        paths:
          - /service1
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST

  - name: service2
    url: http://service2:8080
    routes:
      - name: service2-route
        paths:
          - /service2
        methods:
          - GET

upstreams:
  - name: upstream-service1
    targets:
      - target: service1:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: service1-secondary:8080
        weight: 50

  - name: upstream-service2
    targets:
      - target: service2:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: service2-secondary:8080
        weight: 60

plugins:
  - name: rate-limiting
    service: service1
    config:
      second: 5
      hour: 1000

  - name: rate-limiting
    service: service2
    config:
      second: 10
      hour: 2000
